definitions.name: Agent Profile Dispatch
definitions.description: When to spawn specialized agent profiles from .claude/agents/

definitions.name: Biome Conventions
definitions.description: Biome 2 linter/formatter rules and suppression protocol

definitions.name: Code Analysis Policy
definitions.description: Prefer AST-based analysis over regex for security and architecture checks

definitions.name: Database Conventions
definitions.description: Dual-database architecture (NeonDB + Supabase) boundaries and query patterns

definitions.name: Monorepo Conventions
definitions.description: pnpm workspace, Turborepo, package structure, and publishing conventions

definitions.name: Parameterization Conventions
definitions.description: Never hardcode config values — extract, type, default, and make overridable

definitions.name: Skill Auto-Use Guidelines
definitions.description: When to proactively invoke skills vs wait for explicit user request

definitions.name: Tailwind CSS v4 Conventions
definitions.description: Tailwind v4 syntax rules, v3→v4 migration gotchas, and shared config patterns

definitions.name: Unused Declarations Policy
definitions.description: Never suppress unused warnings without determining if code is incomplete — implement first

definitions.name: Audit
definitions.description: Audit the codebase for avoidable `any` types and production console statements. Use when asked to check code quality, before a release, or after a large refactor.

definitions.name: Gate
definitions.description: Run the full CI gate (Biome lint, typecheck, Vitest, turbo build) before pushing. Only invoke when explicitly asked to run the gate or verify before a push.

definitions.name: New Package
definitions.description: Scaffold a new @revealui/* package with package.json, tsconfig.json, tsup.config.ts, and src/index.ts. Only invoke when explicitly asked to create a new package.

definitions.name: Stripe Best Practices
definitions.description: Apply when working on Stripe billing, payments, webhooks, subscriptions, or checkout flows (apps/api/src/routes/billing.ts, packages/services).

definitions.name: Builder
definitions.description: Builds and typechecks packages in isolation

definitions.name: Docs Sync
definitions.description: Checks documentation freshness against code changes to prevent doc drift

definitions.name: Gate Runner
definitions.description: Runs the full CI gate in isolation

definitions.name: Linter
definitions.description: Lint and format code in isolation

definitions.name: Security Reviewer
definitions.description: Reviews code for security vulnerabilities, hardcoded secrets, and auth issues

definitions.name: Tester
definitions.description: Runs tests for packages in isolation

definitions.name: Database Migration
definitions.description: Create and apply Drizzle ORM migrations with dual-DB boundary checks (NeonDB vs Supabase)

definitions.name: Preflight Check
definitions.description: Run the 15-check pre-launch preflight and interpret results with context-aware fix suggestions

definitions.name: RevealUI Conventions
definitions.description:
RevealUI coding conventions for any code task — writing, editing, reviewing, creating,
fixing, refactoring, changing, adding, or updating TypeScript, React, CSS, or config files.
Covers TypeScript strict mode, ES Modules, Biome formatting, Tailwind v4 syntax,
conventional commits, monorepo workspace protocol, feature gating, parameterization,
and unused declaration policy.

definitions.name: RevealUI Database
definitions.description:
RevealUI database conventions for any task involving database, schema, query, migration,
Drizzle ORM, Supabase, NeonDB, PostgreSQL, vectors, embeddings, or data modeling.
Enforces dual-database architecture boundaries and import restrictions.

definitions.name: RevealUI Debugging
definitions.description:
Systematic debugging workflow for RevealUI. Use when encountering any bug, test failure,
unexpected behavior, error, or broken functionality. Prevents shotgun debugging.

definitions.name: RevealUI Code Review
definitions.description:
Code review checklist for RevealUI. Use when reviewing code, completing a feature,
checking quality, or before committing. Invoke explicitly with $revealui-review.

definitions.name: RevealUI Safety
definitions.description:
RevealUI safety guardrails for any code task — editing, writing, creating, fixing,
refactoring, changing, adding, updating, or removing files. Protects credentials,
enforces import boundaries, ensures code quality, and verifies work before completion.

definitions.name: RevealUI TDD
definitions.description:
Test-driven development workflow for RevealUI. Use when implementing any feature,
fixing bugs, adding functionality, or writing new code. Enforces write-test-first,
red-green-refactor cycle. Works with Vitest and React Testing Library.

definitions.name: RevealUI Testing
definitions.description:
RevealUI monorepo testing rules and failure-triage guidance. Use when changing tests,
fixing flaky suites, adjusting Vitest config, debugging Turbo test failures, handling
React Testing Library warnings, or deciding between scoped timeouts, worker limits,
and test refactors in this repo.

definitions.name: Tailwind CSS v4 Documentation
definitions.description: Agent-optimized access to Tailwind CSS v4 documentation for answering questions, selecting utilities/variants, configuring Tailwind v4, and avoiding v3→v4 migration pitfalls.
